method: Hand-curated on 2026-07-13 as a held-out suite after the development set and retrieval-lever research were frozen. Each query is a compact agent-style information need, not a page title or source path. Gold source_rel paths were checked against the local Unity 6000.3 source tree; the evaluator also refuses to run unless every gold path is present in the built corpus. The suite balances 100 Manual and 100 Scripting API cases and must not be used to choose a retrieval lever or tune its parameters.

baseline.retrieval: pages_fts top 10 with existing title:body bm25 weights
